prompt: For a protein engineering research program, optimize the melting temperature (Tm) of KDR (Tyrosine protein kinase VEGFR family) from Homo sapiens. provide a computational approach for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
